title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
